meaning: n.山羊胡子,(只留于下颚的)胡子
examples: I notice he has a goatee and a blue Lakers cap.
Despite his goatee, Mr Mallya deserves a hearing.
He had markings that looked a bit like a mustache and goatee.
But there is one thing that remains Wiens' signature from before the accident: his goatee.
There was Greg Myerson, a lumberjack-sized man complete with the requisite red hair and goatee.
